mnemonics.title: Android Architecture Layers
mnemonics.content: LHANA - Linux kernel, HAL, ART+Native libs, Application framework, Apps. Bottom to top: 'Linux HAL ART Native Apps'

mnemonics.title: Application Framework Services
mnemonics.content: AWCVP-TRLM: Activity mgr, Window mgr, Content providers, View system, Package mgr, Telephony, Resource, Location, Notification managers

mnemonics.title: ART vs Dalvik
mnemonics.content: ART = AOT + JIT (both), Dalvik = JIT only. ART is faster at runtime, Dalvik was faster at install.

mnemonics.title: Linux Kernel Functions
mnemonics.content: DPMPSN: Drivers, Process mgmt, Memory mgmt, Power mgmt, Security, Networking - the six key Linux kernel responsibilities in Android.

mnemonics.title: Native Libraries
mnemonics.content: SOWM-BSF: SQLite, OpenGL ES, WebKit, Media Framework, Bionic libc, SSL, SGL, FreeType - key native C/C++ libraries.
